docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY AMSBRY, MARCIA DBA SALON ANDRES AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MARZIA & LITTLE, KELLI DBA SALON ZINDAGI JOHNSON, MARZIA & LITTLE, KELLIE DAB SALON ZINDAGI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-23-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
